title: Website Updates
content:
This just adds loads of stuff, such as:
- News updates.
- A new role 'Silencer'.
- Some re-work on some role icons.

Plans:
I plan to add images as the icons for the roles.

title: Full Update of Website
content:
The website if fully updated now, which contains:
- New Role Icons in the roles page.
- Added icons in the Mod Options tab for each role setting/option.

Please note that the icons used in the website WILL be different in the mod and will be updated, which means those icons are placeholders and just look prettier than what's currently in the mod.

title: Another Website Update
content:
This is the latest version of the website. It added the new roles from v2.1-r, a new features page which shows all the features the mod adds.
This will most likely update a week or two later than which v3.0-r fully releases.

Some of the stuff will be added to the website from the test version of 3.0, so it is a lot less when the full version releases in March.

Thanks for your support, it helps me to continue even when some stuff are making it harder to continue.

title: Website UI Rework
content:
The website has gotten its full rework.
After an entire 2 months of working on the website and managing my school work, I have managed to finish the UI rework the website desprately needed.

Feel free to give your feelings about the new UI in my Discord server!

title: Guide Page & New Live Template Editor Addition
content:
This is a bit of a bigger project I had to finish before I have to push a release for TOR-W:L v3.0-r.

Although the new Live Template Editor cannot be used for the alpha version of the mod, it is advised to get to know the layout of it. Also, the Live Template Editor might be buggy, so do not use it without knowing how it works!!

The new Guide page is also something bigger than the Live Template Editor, as it took mee almost 2 weeks to finish and get all the new roles and stuff added to the Guide page. Please do take note, it is there to help new OR existing players with the new roles and the role's mechanics.

Anyways, that's all from me!
